content.highlightedText: local data is never physically copied to the group level
content.author: alice.chen@example.com
content.text: The virtual approach means group queries fan out to the EuropeRe data source. For 8 local LoBs × 6 amount types × 18 months that's about 860 rows, split through 13 mapping rules into roughly 2,500 group-level rows — all computed in-memory. Performance is well within acceptable limits.
